key_insight: The MaterEval framework enhances evaluations of materials by combining expert-informed judgments with blind guesses.
engineering_relevance: This approach accelerates materials discovery by improving the accuracy and reliability of evaluations in high-throughput candidate screening.
method: Introduces Knowledge-Augmented Preference Signals Framework for candidate evaluation.
Generates dual evaluations: informed judgments with evidence and blind guesses.
Utilizes a fast-slow reasoning scheme to optimize screening and review processes.
evidence_signal: Small open-source LLMs show significant accuracy gains in evaluations without external data retrieval.
watch_item: Requires careful consideration of the balance between throughput and evaluation depth to avoid oversight.
paper_title: From Blind Guess to Informed Judgment: Teaching LLMs to Evaluate Materials by Building Knowledge-Augmented Preference Signals
